title: KKR Announces Intra-Quarter Monetization Activity Update for the First Quarter
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR today announced a monetization activity update for the period from January 1, 2023 to March 23, 2023. Based on information available to us as of today, with respect to the period through March 23, 2023, KKR has earned gross realized carried interest and total realized investment income in excess of $325 million.
